title: DBT major projects: appointment letters for Senior Responsible Owners
body: "Each government department publishes the letters of appointment for their GMPP SROs. These letters include:   date of appointment project deliverables what the SRO is responsible for how long the role is expected to last   The guidance for officials giving evidence to Parliamentary Select Committees, known as the Osmotherly Rules, was updated on 17 October 2014. As part of this update we are committed to publishing GMPP SRO letters of appointment.  "
